headline: Gartner (IT) Stock Could Be 31% Undervalued After Its Recent Share Price Slide
summary: Gartner (IT) has drawn attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down 5% over the past day, 14% over the past week, and 21% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Gartner. Looking beyond the latest drop, Gartner’s 1 year total shareholder return has fallen 68.08%, while the year to date share price return of 46.21% lower points to fading momentum as investors reassess the company’s risk and growth profile.
